lore.english:
A witch who lives in the Demon Realm. Back in her prime, she had immense magical power, but several decades ago, the Taimanins sealed away that power, causing her body to regress to a childlike form. As a side effect of the seal, her personality also reverted to the innocent cheerfulness of her childhood. However, her knowledge remains that of an adult, and her manner of speaking is grandiose.

Though she can no longer wield the full strength she had at her peak, she still possesses enough magic to defeat lesser demons. Her primary method of combat is to channel her magic into her familiars, Kuro and Shiro, and send them to strike at her enemies.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Familiar Attack[-]
skills.description:
Sends familiars Shiro and Kuro toward the enemy to attack 2 times.
Target hit is inflicted with [&Color_Cyan]([V3:1040102]%)[-] [&SpdDown] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:1040102]%[-] chance. 
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:1040102] turn(s)
skills.description_readable:

[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:1040102] turn(s)

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Poison Spell[-]
skills.description:
Creates a magic sigil under the enemy, to attack.
Target hit is inflicted with [&Color_Cyan]([V3:1040202]%)[-] [&Poison] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:1040202]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:1040202] turn(s)
When defeating an enemy with this skill, inflicts [&Color_Cyan]([V3:1040203]%)[-] [&Poison] to [&Common_Word_Skill_EnemyAll] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:1040203]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:1040203] turn(s)

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Cure Spell[-]
skills.description: Restores [&HP] of [&Common_Word_Skill_AllyAll] equal to [&Color_Cyan][V3:1040301]%[-] of the target's Max. [&HP].
skills.description_readable: Restores [&HP] of [&Common_Word_Skill_AllyAll] equal to [V3:1040301]% of the target's Max. [&HP].
